title: rubus oigocladus
intro: Rubus oigocladus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Rubus oigocladus is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often consumed raw or used topically as a paste to treat various ailments.
